creator: rsecor@seqlogic.com
text:
I rebuilt my kernel and source tree complely (buildworld,  
buildkernel, installkernel, installworld), rebooted... and guess what?
It works now.

Guess there was some sort of change in _types.h.
Since one of the messages was:
      /usr/include/machine/_types.h:51: error: syntax error before  
"typedef"

Thanks,
Rich
